trigger: 陆姝仪陷害导致女主早产、得知前世长子未归、高父甩出和离书以及女主平静原谅他时。

appearance_delta.face: 眼尾猩红，泪流满面，神情极度恐慌与崩溃，脸颊可能有被扇耳光的红印
appearance_delta.body: 脊背弯折，失去所有体面，甚至下跪祈求，身体僵硬发抖
appearance_delta.hair: 发冠歪斜，发丝凌乱散落
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 高岭之花彻底跌落神坛，眼神从不可置信转为绝望的疯狂

costume_override.outfit: 原本考究的常服变得凌乱不堪，带有深深的褶皱，衣摆可能沾染灰尘或血迹

visual_reference: 1boy, ancient chinese handsome official, jade-like face, crying, red-rimmed amber eyes with tears, messy unkempt hair, wearing wrinkled and dusty dark purple traditional robes, kneeling posture, shattered and desperate expression, begging, masterpiece, highly detailed, dramatic lighting, 8k resolution
emotional_tone: 极度恐慌，绝望崩溃，卑微祈求
